description: Semaphore is a CI/CD platform for running and managing software delivery pipelines. It provides cloud-hosted build, test, deployment, and AI-assisted workflow tooling for engineering teams.
summary: Semaphore exposes a tenant-scoped REST API, two official CLIs (`sem` and `sem-ai`), and a hosted MCP server; all require authentication via Semaphore-issued API tokens, with MCP also supporting OAuth.
